scripts.build:assets: tailwindcss -c tailwind.config.js -i app/static/css/input.css -o app/static/css/app.css --minify && cp node_modules/htmx.org/dist/htmx.min.js app/static/js/htmx.min.js && cp node_modules/alpinejs/dist/cdn.min.js app/static/js/alpine.min.js && mkdir -p app/static/css/phosphor-icons && cp -r node_modules/@phosphor-icons/web/src/* app/static/css/phosphor-icons/
